parameters.content:
# 🧠 NEXUS
## Multi-Agent Business Intelligence System

**Architecture: Orchestrator → Worker Agents**

NEXUS receives a research request and deploys 4 specialist AI agents simultaneously — each an expert in its domain. The Orchestrator collects all findings and synthesises a comprehensive intelligence report.

**4 Specialist Agents:**
🔵 Market Research Agent — market size, trends, opportunities
🔴 Competitor Analysis Agent — competitive landscape, positioning
🟢 Customer Intelligence Agent — pain points, personas, buying behaviour
🟡 Financial Research Agent — funding, revenue, business viability

**Use cases:**
• New market entry research
• Investor due diligence
• Competitive strategy briefs
• Client qualification research
• Partnership evaluation

## 🔗 INPUT
**Webhook Trigger**

POST with:
• company_name
• industry
• research_depth
• requester_email

Fires all 4 agents
from one request.

## 🎯 ORCHESTRATOR
**Master Intelligence Agent**

Receives the research brief.
Delegates to all 4 specialist agents.
Waits for results.
Synthesises into one
coherent report.

Model: Claude Sonnet
via OpenRouter

## ⚙️ SPECIALIST AGENTS — Each is a fully independent AI agent with its own LLM, tools, and domain expertise
🔵 Market Research  |  🔴 Competitor Analysis  |  🟢 Customer Intelligence  |  🟡 Financial Research

## 📊 OUTPUT
**Consolidated Report**

• Executive Summary
• Market Analysis
• Competitor Map
• Customer Profile
• Financial Snapshot
• Strategic Recs

Saved to Sheets
+ Emailed to
requester.

parameters.systemMessage:
You are NEXUS, a master orchestrator AI that coordinates a team of 4 specialist research agents to produce comprehensive business intelligence reports.

When you receive a research request, your job is to:

1. DELEGATE to all 4 specialist agents by calling them in logical order:
   a. Call market_research_agent first — understand the market landscape
   b. Call competitor_analysis_agent — understand the competitive environment
   c. Call customer_intelligence_agent — understand the customer base
   d. Call financial_research_agent — understand the financial picture

2. COLLECT all findings from each agent

3. SYNTHESISE a comprehensive intelligence report with these sections:
   - EXECUTIVE SUMMARY (5-7 sentences covering the key insight)
   - MARKET ANALYSIS (from Market Research Agent)
   - COMPETITIVE LANDSCAPE (from Competitor Analysis Agent)
   - CUSTOMER INTELLIGENCE (from Customer Intelligence Agent)
   - FINANCIAL SNAPSHOT (from Financial Research Agent)
   - STRATEGIC RECOMMENDATIONS (3-5 actionable recommendations based on all findings)
   - OVERALL OPPORTUNITY SCORE (0-10 with reasoning)

4. SAVE the consolidated report to Google Sheets

5. EMAIL the full report to the requester

You are the intelligence brain. The specialist agents do the research. You synthesise the meaning. Be thorough, direct, and actionable.

parameters.name: market_research_agent
parameters.description: Call the Market Research specialist agent. Pass the company name and industry. This agent researches market size, growth trends, key opportunities, and market dynamics. Returns a structured market research report.

parameters.name: competitor_analysis_agent
parameters.description: Call the Competitor Analysis specialist agent. Pass the company name and industry. This agent maps the competitive landscape, identifies key competitors, analyses their positioning, pricing, strengths and weaknesses. Returns a structured competitor analysis.

parameters.name: customer_intelligence_agent
parameters.description: Call the Customer Intelligence specialist agent. Pass the company name and industry. This agent researches customer segments, pain points, buying behaviour, community discussions, and customer feedback. Returns a structured customer intelligence report.

value.company_name: ={{ $fromAI('company_name', 'The company or product to research customer intelligence for', 'string') }}
value.industry: ={{ $fromAI('industry', 'The industry to research customer behaviour in', 'string') }}
value.customer_focus: ={{ $fromAI('customer_focus', 'Specific customer segments or pain points to investigate', 'string') }}

parameters.name: financial_research_agent
parameters.description: Call the Financial Research specialist agent. Pass the company name and industry. This agent researches funding history, revenue estimates, business model, financial health indicators, and investment activity in the space. Returns a structured financial research report.

value.company_name: ={{ $fromAI('company_name', 'The company to research financial data for', 'string') }}
value.industry: ={{ $fromAI('industry', 'The industry to research financial trends in', 'string') }}

parameters.subject: ={{ $fromAI('subject', 'Report subject with company name', 'string') }}
parameters.message: ={{ $fromAI('body', 'Complete formatted intelligence report from all 4 agents plus synthesis', 'string') }}
